name: Rosky's
recipeInstructions: Combine butter, margarine, and cream cheese. Add flour. Refrigerate a few hours or overnight. Roll out as for pie crust. Cut into 2-inch circles or squares. Place 1/2 tablespoon apricot filling in the center. Pinch the center to seal. Place on an ungreased baking sheet. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 12 minutes. If they pop open, press together while still hot. Cool on a rack. Dust with powdered sugar before serving.
